tasks.title: Add CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS and MAX_COLLECTIONS enum keys
tasks.description: Add `CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS = 'can_use_collections'` to `EntitlementKey` in packages/billing/src/types/entitlement.types.ts, and `MAX_COLLECTIONS = 'max_collections'` to `LimitKey` in packages/billing/src/types/plan.types.ts. This is the foundational step: LIMIT_METADATA and RESOURCE_NAMES are `Record<LimitKey, ...>` and will fail to compile until their entries are added in later tasks. Test requirements: extend packages/billing/test/entitlements.test.ts and packages/billing/test/limits.test.ts to assert the new enum members exist with the expected string values.

subtasks.title: Add unit test assertions for both new enum values

qualityGate.typecheck: pending-by-design (blocked on T-002/T-003 LIMIT_METADATA exhaustiveness, documented in task description)

tasks.title: Add CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS entitlement metadata entry
tasks.description: Add an entry to the entitlement metadata array in packages/billing/src/config/entitlements.config.ts for `EntitlementKey.CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS` (key, name: 'Use favorites collections', description mentioning organizing saved favorites into named collections). Follow the exact object shape of the existing `CAN_VIEW_SEARCH_HISTORY` entry. Test requirements: packages/billing/test/entitlements.test.ts should already have (or gain) a completeness/exhaustiveness assertion that every EntitlementKey has metadata — verify it covers the new key.

tasks.title: Add MAX_COLLECTIONS limit metadata and display name entries
tasks.description: Add `[LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS]: { name, description }` to `LIMIT_METADATA` in packages/billing/src/config/limits.config.ts, and add `max_collections: 'colecciones'` to `RESOURCE_NAMES` in apps/api/src/utils/limit-check.ts. Both are exhaustive `Record<LimitKey, ...>` maps enforced at compile time. Test requirements: extend packages/billing/test/limits.test.ts (metadata presence) and apps/api/test/utils/limit-check.test.ts (resource name used in upgrade messages).

tasks.title: Wire collections entitlement and limit into tourist plan definitions
tasks.description: In packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts: add `EntitlementKey.CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS` + `limit(LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS, 10)` to `TOURIST_PLUS_PLAN`. Add `EntitlementKey.CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS` + `limit(LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS, 25)` to the shared `TOURIST_VIP_ENTITLEMENTS` / `TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS` constants (so tourist-vip AND owner/complex inherit it, same pattern already used for MAX_SEARCH_HISTORY_ENTRIES per SPEC-289). Do NOT touch `TOURIST_FREE_PLAN` — it must have neither the entitlement nor the limit. Test requirements: extend packages/billing/test/plans.test.ts asserting tourist-free lacks CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS, tourist-plus limit is 10, tourist-vip limit is 25, and owner/complex plans inherit the 25 limit + entitlement via the shared VIP tier.

subtasks.title: Add entitlement + limit(25) to shared TOURIST_VIP_ENTITLEMENTS/LIMITS

tasks.title: Add gateCollections() entitlement middleware
tasks.description: Add a `gateCollections()` middleware to apps/api/src/middlewares/tourist-entitlements.ts, modeled exactly on `gateSearchHistory()`: entitlement-only check for `EntitlementKey.CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS`, throws `ServiceError(ServiceErrorCode.ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED, ...)` with an upgrade message ('Las colecciones de favoritos solo están disponibles en los planes Plus y VIP...') and `{ requiredEntitlement, upgradeUrl: '/billing/plans' }` details when missing. Staff bypass works automatically via `entitlementMiddleware()` loading the unlimited set first (INV-6), same as the other gate functions in this file. Test requirements: extend apps/api/test/middlewares/entitlement.test.ts with cases for gateCollections (blocks without entitlement, passes with entitlement, staff bypass).

subtasks.title: Add JSDoc following existing gate function conventions

tasks.title: Switch _canCreate quota check from env var to ctx.hookState.planLimit
tasks.description: In packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.service.ts, the quota is enforced inside the `_canCreate(actor, data, ctx)` BaseCrudService lifecycle hook — a fixed-signature override, so a new positional `planLimit` param cannot be added to it directly (corrected during spec-realign 2026-07-01; ADR-026 also predicted this migration but assumed the simpler `enforceFavoritesLimit`-style middleware, which does not fit because collections excludes free entirely, unlike favorites). Instead: read the resolved limit from `ctx?.hookState?.planLimit` (the per-request hook-state bag already designed for this, see `ServiceContext.hookState`, SPEC-088) inside `_canCreate`, falling back to `DEFAULT_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER` only if `hookState.planLimit` is undefined (defensive default for any caller that doesn't pass it yet). Remove the `process.env.HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER` read from `getMaxCollectionsPerUser()`, but keep that function exported for now — `list.ts` (T-014) still calls it until T-014 migrates it too. Test requirements: rewrite the env-var-based cases in packages/service-core/test/services/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.limit.test.ts to pass `{ hookState: { planLimit } }` as the `ctx` argument (quota reached at the boundary, one below limit passes).

subtasks.title: Read ctx?.hookState?.planLimit in _canCreate with safe fallback
Rewrite QUOTA_EXCEEDED check to use hookState.planLimit
Rewrite userBookmarkCollection.limit.test.ts cases to pass hookState

tasks.title: Mount gateCollections() on gate-only collection routes
tasks.description: Mount `gateCollections()` in `options.middlewares` for the five user-bookmark-collection protected routes that need only the entitlement gate (no limit resolution): getById, update, delete, addBookmark, removeBookmark (apps/api/src/routes/user-bookmark-collection/protected/{getById,update,delete,addBookmark,removeBookmark}.ts). `list` is handled separately in T-014 because it also needs plan-limit resolution for its `usage.max` response field, and `create` in T-008 because it needs plan-limit resolution for the quota check. Follow the exact `options: { middlewares: [gateCollections()] }` pattern used in search-history/protected/list.ts. Test requirements: add or extend route tests under apps/api/test/routes/user-bookmark-collection/ asserting a 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED response for an actor lacking CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS, for each of the five routes.

subtasks.title: Add 403 test coverage for each of the 5 routes

tasks.title: Mount gate and resolve plan limit on create-collection route
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/routes/user-bookmark-collection/protected/create.ts: mount `gateCollections()` via `options.middlewares`, then resolve the actor's limit with `getRemainingLimit(ctx as Context<AppBindings>, LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS)` (same pattern as search-history/protected/list.ts, mapping -1/unlimited and 0/disabled to safe values), and pass it via `collectionService.createCollection(actor, { ...input, userId: actor.id }, { hookState: { planLimit } })` — `_canCreate` (T-006) reads it from `ctx.hookState.planLimit`, NOT a positional param, since `_canCreate`'s signature is a fixed BaseCrudService hook contract. Test requirements: apps/api/test/routes/user-bookmark-collection/create.test.ts (new or extended) — 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED without the entitlement, QUOTA_EXCEEDED exactly at the plan boundary for both plus (10) and vip (25).

tasks.title: Remove HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER env var
tasks.description: Remove the now-unused `HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER` variable: delete its Zod schema entry from apps/api/src/utils/env.ts, its registry entry from packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts, and its line from apps/api/.env.example (and apps/api/.env.local if present, locally only — do not commit .env.local). Also remove `getMaxCollectionsPerUser()` / `DEFAULT_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER` from userBookmarkCollection.service.ts now that both consumers (T-006's `_canCreate`, T-014's `list.ts`) are migrated off it. Test requirements: run `pnpm env:check:registry` to confirm registry/schema stay in sync; update apps/api/test/utils/env.test.ts if it references this variable.

tasks.title: Write extras migration to propagate collections keys to live plan rows
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/migrations/extras/024-billing-plans-collections-limit.plan.sql (resolve the exact next available number at implementation time — check the directory listing again, other specs may land first). Idempotently add `can_use_collections` to `billing_plans.entitlements` and `max_collections` (10 for tourist-plus, 25 for tourist-vip/owner/complex) to `billing_plans.limits`, following the OR-PRESERVE guarded-UPDATE pattern from extras/023-billing-plans-ai-consumer-search-limits.plan.sql (never overwrite a key already present). Test requirements: manually verify via `pnpm db:apply-extras` (idempotent re-run = zero affected rows on second run); if an automated extras-migration guard test suite exists, add a case there.

subtasks.title: Write OR-PRESERVE guarded UPDATE for entitlements array
Write OR-PRESERVE guarded UPDATE for limits JSONB
Verify idempotency with pnpm db:apply-extras run twice

tasks.title: Flip PlanComparisonTable collections row from upcoming to available
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/billing/PlanComparisonTable.astro, update the `collections` row in `TOURIST_EXPERIENCE_ROWS`: change `status: 'upcoming'` to `status: 'available'`, and change `cell: { kind: 'literals', values: [...] }` to `cell: { kind: 'limit', key: LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS }` (same shape as the `favorites` and `searchHistory` rows). This closes the loop referenced in spec §6: SPEC-282 badged this row 'Próximamente' until SPEC-287 enforced the gating. Test requirements: extend apps/web/test/components/billing/PlanComparisonTable.test.ts to assert the collections row is now 'available' and limit-driven.

subtasks.title: Change status to 'available' for collections row
Change cell to limit-kind using LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS

tasks.title: Update endpoint gate matrix docs for collections routes
tasks.description: Update docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md to document the new `CAN_USE_COLLECTIONS` gate on all seven /api/v1/protected/user-bookmark-collections routes (create, list, getById, update, delete, addBookmark, removeBookmark), following the existing table format used for search-history and price-alerts entries. Test requirements: none (documentation) — verify the entries against the actual mounted middlewares from T-007/T-008.

subtasks.title: Add gate-matrix rows for all 7 collection routes

tasks.title: Write cross-cutting entitlement + limit integration test
tasks.description: Add apps/api/test/routes/user-bookmark-collection/entitlement-gate.integration.test.ts covering the full flow across tourist plans: tourist-free actor gets 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED on every collection route; tourist-plus actor can create up to 10 collections then gets QUOTA_EXCEEDED on the 11th; tourist-vip actor can create up to 25 then gets QUOTA_EXCEEDED on the 26th. Test requirements: use the project's standard route-testing harness/fixtures (mirror the structure of an existing multi-plan integration test, e.g. apps/api/test/routes/search-history or apps/api/test/routes/user-bookmark/toggleAtCap.test.ts for the at-cap pattern).

tasks.title: Mount gate and migrate usage.max on list-collections route
tasks.description: Found during spec-realign (2026-07-01): apps/api/src/routes/user-bookmark-collection/protected/list.ts ALSO calls `getMaxCollectionsPerUser()` (env var) to populate its `usage: { current, max }` response field — the original T-007 scope missed this second consumer. In list.ts: mount `gateCollections()` via `options.middlewares`, and replace the `getMaxCollectionsPerUser()` call with `getRemainingLimit(ctx as Context<AppBindings>, LimitKey.MAX_COLLECTIONS)` (same resolution pattern as T-008's create.ts), mapping -1/unlimited and 0/disabled to safe values for the `usage.max` field. Test requirements: extend the list route test to assert `usage.max` reflects the actor's plan limit (10 for plus, 25 for vip) instead of the old env default, plus the standard 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED case without the entitlement.

subtasks.title: Extend list route test for usage.max and 403 case

tasks.title: Mark ADR-026 as superseded by SPEC-287
tasks.description: Found during spec-realign (2026-07-01): docs/decisions/ADR-026-collections-limit-strategy.md documented the exact 'if collections become a monetization lever' migration this spec performs, and predicted mirroring `enforceFavoritesLimit`. That prediction undershoots: collections excludes tourist-free entirely (OQ-2/OQ-3), which `enforceFavoritesLimit` (a limit-only middleware, no entitlement check, since favorites is available on every tourist plan) cannot express — the entitlement gate (`gateCollections`, T-005) is required. Add a 'Status: Superseded by SPEC-287 (2026-07-01)' line and a short addendum section to ADR-026 explaining the actual mechanism shipped (LimitKey + EntitlementKey + gateCollections + ctx.hookState) and why it diverged from the ADR's predicted migration path. Do not delete or rewrite the original decision/rationale — ADRs are append-only history. Test requirements: none (documentation).

subtasks.title: Add Superseded status line to ADR-026
Add addendum explaining the entitlement-gate divergence
